title: stylocoryna fragrans
intro: Stylocoryna fragrans, also known as the fragrant stylocoryna, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Stylocoryna fragrans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, such as colds, coughs, and flu.
